prompt:
Subject:
Summer by the tracks

Main Subject:
A vertical photograph. A portrait of a small station in summer, captured with a fisheye lens. A woman in white clothes is prominently featured in the lower center of the screen, captured from the upper body down to her feet. The person stands on a narrow road in front of the station, leaning forward slightly as if approaching the camera. A green and cream-colored train is in the background to the right, a stone wall and station sign are on the left, and a blue sky and overhead power lines spread across the top.

Person/Expression:
A natural and realistic woman. Shoulder-length dark brown bob hair, thin see-through bangs, and slightly inward-curled strands around the face. Transparent Japanese-style natural makeup with pale pink-beige lips, fine eyelashes, soft tear bags, and modest blush. Her face is directed towards the camera, looking up with calm eyes while tilting her head slightly. The mouth is smiling just a tiny bit.

Clothing/Pose:
White off-the-shoulder mini dress. Thin ruffles at the chest and cuffs, a small ribbon at the center front, and light wrinkles in the thin cotton material. A cream-colored crochet tote bag on her left shoulder, and beige platform sandals on her feet. Her body is slightly folded towards the foreground, arms are relaxed and hanging naturally downwards, and hands are placed near the front of her thighs. Fingers are not spread too wide, falling naturally with gravity. Knees are lightly together, and feet are slightly inward.

Background/Light:
Station front along the railway on a sunny afternoon. Old stone wall on the left, a green station sign, hydrangea leaves, and small flowers. In the background to the right, a retro green and cream-colored train is stopped or moving slowly, a yellow and black railroad crossing bar, and the blurred silhouette of a person walking in the distance. Overlapping power lines and utility poles cross overhead. Strong summer sunlight enters from the top right, creating bright highlights on the hair surface, shoulders, and white clothes. Leaf shadows and a dark shadow of the person fall on the ground.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, ultra-wide fisheye lens. The camera looks down from a slightly higher position than the person at a close distance. The outer edge of the screen is surrounded by black circular fisheye vignetting, clear at the center and heavily distorted at the edges. The person's face is near the center of the screen, and feet are at the bottom center. The background tracks, road, and power lines curve as if being sucked into the distance, creating a strong sense of perspective. Focus is on the face and clothes, with the background slightly blurred.

Texture/Style:
A realistic photo taken with a professional camera. Carefully depicts the bright summer air, natural skin texture, thinness of the white cloth, fine irregularities of the asphalt, and the metallic feel of the train. Colors center on the contrast of white, deep green, blue sky, and sunlight, creating a clean and slightly nostalgic Japanese street photo. No excessive skin correction, natural lens distortion, and a light film feel.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fusion of hands and feet, broken joints, unnatural gravity, floating, broken clothes, deformed bag, overly distorted train, incorrect perspective, shadows contradicting the light source, garbled characters, logo, watermark, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin.
